summary: Tested avatar quality, photo gallery, thumbnail migration API, and Create Card picker features. Backend API verified working. UI partial verification due to session handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Avatar.tsx line 73: resizeMode 'cover' correctly added to imageStyle - prevents distortion
contact/[id].tsx line 1900: heroAvatar style includes resizeMode 'cover'
Photo gallery grid implementation (lines 1846-1871): Correct 3-column layout with type badges (Profile, Congrats, Birthday)
Gallery tile data-testid pattern (line 1860): gallery-tile-0, gallery-tile-1, etc.
Photo navigation buttons (lines 1803-1831): Prev/Next with counter and data-testid attributes
Back to gallery button (lines 1835-1844): 'All Photos' with data-testid='back-to-gallery-grid'
Single photo shortcut logic (lines 532-535): Correctly skips grid when only 1 photo
Thumbnail migration endpoint (contacts.py lines 498-528): Regenerates at 256x256 @ 85% JPEG
Create Card picker (thread/[id].tsx lines 2591-2628): Shows 6 card types with correct data-testid attributes

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - UI timing issues in automation

feature_1_avatar_quality_resize_mode_cov.note: 256x256 @ 85% JPEG quality for crisp thumbnails on Retina displays

verified_elements: Gallery grid with 3-column layout (32% width tiles)
Type badge overlay on each tile (Profile, Congrats, Birthday)
'All Photos' button to return to grid
feature_3_photo_full_screen_navigation.ui_verification: Photo viewer opened successfully for API Test contact showing 'Birthday - API Test' with date

feature_4_single_photo_shortcut.logic: if (photos.length <= 1) setSelectedPhotoIndex(0); // Skip grid, go straight to full view
feature_4_single_photo_shortcut.ui_verification: Confirmed - API Test contact with 1 photo went directly to full-screen view (no grid)

verified_elements: Card type picker modal with 6 types

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified through code review and partial UI testing. Photo viewer works correctly - single photo shortcut confirmed. Thumbnail migration API returns correct response. Create Card picker has all 6 card types with correct data-testid attributes.
